allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $result = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $null }; if \($result -and $result.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "Backend UP : $\($result.Content\)" } else { Write-Host "Backend pas encore prêt ou erreur" })

PowerShell($result = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"identifier":"test@test.com","password":"wrong"}' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $_.Exception.Response }; if \($result\) { Write-Host "Status: $\($result.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "Pas de réponse" })
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m.upper\(\), p\) for p,ops in d.get\('paths',{}\).items\(\) for m in ops if any\(x in p for x in ['employee','user','staff']\)]")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/v3/api-docs" -TimeoutSec 5; $r.paths.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'employ|user|staff|member' } | ForEach-Object { $_.Name + " => " + \($_.Value.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ", "\) } } catch { "Backend non joignable: $_" })
